rationale: UNI has a hard-capped total supply of 1,000,000,000 tokens, all of which were minted at genesis in September 2020; there is no ongoing emission schedule or inflationary mint mechanism. The original governance proposal included a 2% perpetual inflation clause starting in Year 4 (i.e., from ~September 2024), but this provision has never been activated by a governance vote, so the circulating and total supply remain effectively static at ~1B UNI.
